subcodes.first_line: O honorable person!  Your letter has arrived and I have read it. You ask about the creed of 'Abdu'l-Baha. My creed is the unity of all human beings
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شخص محترم نامه شما رسید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل گردید سوال از عقیده عبدالبهاء
subcodes.subjects: @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @oneness; unity of religion, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @universal language, @religion as source of love and unity, @harmony of science and religion, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @equality of men and women
